name: Raysum Co., Ltd.
summary: Raysum Co., Ltd. engages in the real estate investment business in Japan. It also operates community hostels; and a specialized surgery center that offers medical care services to assist the elderly. The company was formerly known as Recrm Research Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Raysum Co., Ltd. in 2008. Raysum Co., Ltd. was founded in 1992 and is based in Tokyo, Japan.
